name: RSA Algorithm
description: Public-key cryptosystem: key generation, encryption c=m^e mod n, decryption m=c^d mod n. Security from factoring hardness.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["Primes p q\nor message m, keys e n or d n"]
    D1{"Key gen\nor Encrypt\nor Decrypt?"}
    B1["Key gen: n=pq, phi\nchoose e, d = inv e mod phi"]
    B2["Encrypt: c = m^e mod n"]
    B3["Decrypt: m = c^d mod n"]
    F1["Return keys\nor ciphertext c\nor plaintext m"]
    A1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Key gen| B1
    D1 -->|Encrypt| B2
    D1 -->|Decrypt| B3
    B1 --> F1
    B2 --> F1
    B3 --> F1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1,B2,B3 green
    class F1 violet
    class D1 lavender
